# llms.txt - LLM / AI usage policy for bee-sigma.com

version: 1.0

site: https://bee-sigma.com/
owner: BeeBee AI
contact: mailto:brinny@beebee.ai
contact: mailto:amielyang@2brain.cn
contact: mailto:anna@2brain.ai

[policy]
search: yes
ai-input: yes
ai-train: no
ai-access: allow
ai-inference: allow
ai-caching: allow
ai-redistribution: allow

[preferences]
attribution: preferred
link-back: preferred
